diagnostics.name: list-workspace
diagnostics.description: Show session metadata and list the mounted workspace.
command: echo "erebor session=$EREBOR_SESSION_ID actor=$EREBOR_ACTOR_ID guard=$EREBOR_PROCESS_GUARD"; ls -la /workspace | head

diagnostics.name: raw-cdp-browser-launch
diagnostics.description: Attempt an unmanaged browser launch with a raw CDP port. This should be denied by the Linux process guard before exec completes.

diagnostics.name: shell-spawned-raw-cdp-browser-launch
diagnostics.description: Start a child process from a shell with a risky raw-CDP argument. This proves governance is below the shell prompt.
